reviewer_closeout_ledger_reconciliation_.primary_question: Can reconciliation exception attachments stay reproducible across recheck and handoff without authority or clearance claim.
blocked_use: reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay clearance

release_boundary.allowed_use: Repo local synthetic cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay scoring before public wording reuse.
release_boundary.not_allowed_use: Patient care, clinical advice, translation clearance, reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay clearance, external publication clearance, model ranking, or authority or clearance claim.

exact_next_action: Add cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay closeout controls so replayed exception attachments can be closed without authority or clearance claim.
